intro: Hong Kong's finance chief Paul Chan said the territory can serve as a "launch pad" for AI firms, following President Xi Jinping's call for AI to drive shared prosperity. Netflix acquired InterPositive, an AI filmmaking startup co-founded by Ben Affleck, for $587 million in cash. A cybersecurity researcher demonstrated that open-weight AI models can be poisoned for under $100 in roughly an hour, highlighting vulnerabilities in increasingly deployed systems.

whitelist.title: Hong Kong can serve as a ‘launch pad’ for AI firms, finance chief Paul Chan says
whitelist.desc: Comments follow call by President Xi Jinping for AI to become a key driving force for all countries to promote shared prosperity.

whitelist.desc: Experts believe it’s at least possible. We urgently need a plan to navigate the ethical implications

whitelist.title: I skipped college and now earn over $40 an hour in a blue-collar job. The AI boom is creating more opportunities for me.
